parameters.jsCode:
// Fetch Watchlist — hardcoded AI sector companies
const watchlist = [
  { ticker: "NVDA",  companyName: "NVIDIA",
    aliases: ["nvidia", "nvda", "jensen huang"] },
  { ticker: "AMD",   companyName: "AMD",
    aliases: ["amd", "advanced micro devices", "lisa su"] },
  { ticker: "INTC",  companyName: "Intel",
    aliases: ["intel", "intc", "pat gelsinger"] },
  { ticker: "GOOGL", companyName: "Google",
    aliases: ["google", "alphabet", "googl", "deepmind"] },
  { ticker: "AAPL",  companyName: "Apple",
    aliases: ["apple", "aapl", "tim cook"] },
  { ticker: "MSFT",  companyName: "Microsoft",
    aliases: ["microsoft", "msft", "azure", "satya nadella"] },
  { ticker: "META",  companyName: "Meta",
    aliases: ["meta", "facebook", "zuckerberg", "llama"] }
];

return [{ json: { watchlist } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", "temperature": 0.1, "max_tokens": 4000, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You are an analyst who detects whether financial news is genuinely new or recycled narrative. Return valid JSON only. No markdown, no preamble." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Score each article's information age — how fresh is the underlying claim?

Scoring guide:
  80-100: Genuinely new — first time this specific claim has been made, new data, new event
  50-79:  Partially new — new development in ongoing story, adds something to existing narrative
  20-49:  Likely recycled — same claim seen before, new framing but old underlying information
  0-19:   Recycled — commentary, synthesis, or restatement of weeks-old news

Return ONLY a JSON array:
[{
  "article_url": "<exact url>",
  "information_age_score": <integer 0-100>,
  "is_recycled": <true if score < 40, else false>,
  "narrative_label": "<3-5 word phrase naming the narrative e.g. AI chip export restrictions>"
}]

Articles:
" + JSON.stringify($json.articles.map(a => ({ article_url: a.article_url, headline: a.headline, summary: a.summary, published_at: a.published_at, source: a.source }))) } ] }) }}
